source_description: I want to make the underlying framework or workflow that's used in this project to be pluggable with different plugins. Like right now it's being built around SpecKitty, but I would like to explore potentially switching over and using ClaudeFlow's MCP and all the skills that come along with that, as well as potentially a custom workflow that isn't SpecKitty dependent. So I would like to make a feature spec, a refactor spec I guess too, that basically extracts all of that out and instead has a hooks-like system where whatever plugin is enabled is able to hook into these various points of building a spec, building a plan, asking clarifying questions, breaking out into tasks, parallel execution of tasks, automatic reviewing, using the slash command cast verify that I created. And I think that's good enough for now. Well, I think along with this, it would be helpful to just make a more robust way to configure the settings for this app within the TUI.
